name: Kidgilantes
developer: Katie Moses, Sally Nguy, Andrew Purcell, Jessie Aniguid, Xinran Dongfang, Veenna San Felipe, Tyler Liddicoat, Garrett Chavez, Matthew Reed, Ali Zeynalov, Michael Engheta, Mason Taylor, Noah Lu, Angeleen Tan, Yash Dua
short_description: Rescue all animals from their enclosures without being caught by adults! But, you can’t do it alone. You and your friend will have to dress up as adults to get by in this zoo!
